vocab.meaning: tiếng gầm rú đinh tai nhức óc
vocab.example: The deafening roar of jet engines from the nearby airport frequently disrupts my concentration during the day.

vocab.meaning: tiếng kêu o o/rì rì liên tục
vocab.example: There is a persistent hum from the industrial air conditioning units in our office building that never seems to stop.
Every afternoon, the shrill whistle of the old train passing through the outskirts echoes across the neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bấm còi xe không ngừng nghỉ
vocab.example: I find the incessant honking during rush hour incredibly taxing on my mental well-being.
Modern cities are plagued by sonic pollution, ranging from heavy machinery to blaring music in public spaces.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bịch/bộp nặng nề nhưng đục
vocab.example: I often hear the dull thud of heavy parcels being dropped off at the warehouse next door.

vocab.meaning: tiếng lạch cạch và leng keng của kim loại
vocab.example: The old elevator in my apartment block makes a terrifying rattle and clank whenever it moves between floors.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn ào náo động gây mất tập trung
vocab.example: The disruptive clamor of the morning market right outside my window makes it impossible to sleep in on weekends.

vocab.meaning: tiếng xào xạc nhẹ nhàng (của lá cây, giấy)
vocab.example: Fortunately, my workspace overlooks a garden where the only sound is the gentle rustle of leaves in the breeze.

vocab.meaning: tiếng rì rầm bị nén lại/nghe không rõ
vocab.example: From my study, I can hear the muffled murmur of my family talking in the living room, which feels quite comforting.
